query: UPDATE users SET isApproved = true WHERE loginMethod != 'email' OR loginMethod IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dCz1QvnpntshJi7.root --database jvZMyWuKFNHBGfG95CC7gr --execute UPDATE users SET isApproved = true WHERE loginMethod != 'email' OR loginMethod IS NULL;
